rationale: Review 1 identifies two real, diff-grounded improvements: a missing @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one (confirmed at line 54 — no other simp path covers fiberHomeomorph 1 b) and two redundant .mp/.mpr convenience lemmas (lines 125-133) that bloat API surface with no independent content. Review 2's findings contradict the file's own module docstring, which explicitly places this work in Stage 0.4, and its suggestion to make typeclass instances private would break their intended downstream use.
